'''Flax''' was a tectonically-active [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ptera system]] of the [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]], in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. Most of the surface's land masses were desert due to the high coastal mountain ranges which prevented [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] transference of moisture from the [[Ocean/Legends|seas]].

The native [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Flakax]], lived in underground hives on the planet. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]] the whole sector including this planet, left the Republic and joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. After Flax was conquered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] sometime before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|destruction]] of the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], they were declared [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] workers and were put to work [[Mining/Legends|mining]] the planet's ores.

The planet was later one of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] planets threatened by a possible [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] coup.
